name: Vans 106 Hi Gargoyle
Vans 106 Hi Red
Vans 106 Vulcanized Formula One
Vans Classic Slip-On Loteria
Vans Old Skool A$AP Worldwide Silver Reflective Flames
Vans Authentic A Tribe Called Quest
story: Vans teamed up with legendary hip-hop group, A Tribe Called Quest, for a collaboration that remixes six of the brand’s iconic silhouettes with fresh style. First previewed at ComplexCon, the April 2018 release included the A Tribe Called Quest x Authentic sneaker. The Authentic’s signature canvas upper comes dressed in a graphic print that pays tribute to late Quest member, Phife Dawg. Underfoot, a red ‘Off The Wall’ bumper logo at the heel and vulcanized rubber sole keep the shoe firmly rooted in Vans heritage.

name: Vans Era A Tribe Called Quest
Vans Old Skool A Tribe Called Quest
story: The famous cover art of The Low End Theory, the second album by A Tribe Called Quest, makes its way to the Vans Old Skool. Inspired by the album’s depiction of a female form made up of strokes in red, green and black, similar colorful lines make up the side panels of the shoe. The look is paired with a black toe box, sole and jazz-stripe, while the custom sneaker is finished with The Low End Theory-inspired lettering on the laces.

name: Vans Sk8-Hi A Tribe Called Quest (Yellow)
story: Part of a limited edition, six-sneaker collection, the Vans A Tribe Called Quest x Sk8-Hi sneaker pays tribute to one of hip-hop’s greatest groups, A Tribe Called Quest. This premium design is an ode to Bonita Applebaum—a track from the group’s debut album. It features a suede upper with album artwork graphics at the forefoot and heel and song lyrics covering the laces and lining.

name: Vans Sk8-Hi A Tribe Called Quest
story: Part of a spring 2018 capsule collection that featured several Vans silhouettes paying tribute to A Tribe Called Quest, the Vans A Tribe Called Quest x Sk8-Hi pays homage to one of the group's most famous tracks, 'Bonita Applebum.' The high top upper comes in a light canvas, with suede overlays in a darker tone, and features album artwork, plus lyrics on the laces, quarter panels, and inner collar. A special graphic on the rubber heel brand patch adds a final touch.

name: Vans Moda Hi Acapulco Gold
Vans Acer NI SP Bandana Chili Pepper
Vans Acer Ni SP Denim Paisley
Vans Acer Ni Checker Black White (Billy's)
Vans Acer Ni Checker Black Red (Billy's)
Vans Vault OG Classic Slip-On LX Adsum Van's Best Friend
Vans Sk8-Hi EXT Advisory Board Crystals Blue
story: The Advisory Board Crystals x Vans Sk8-Hi EXT 'Blue' is crafted with a shortened, padded collar and doubled-up tongues. The upper features blue textile construction with navy suede overlays and a navy leather side stripe. A drawcord lacing system combines with webbing pull tabs at the tongue and heel for easy on and off. Anchoring the sneaker is a cream-colored vulcanized rubber midsole, accented with a red Vans license plate at the heel.

name: Vans Sk8-Hi EXT Advisory Board Crystals Ecru
story: The Advisory Board Crystals x Vans Sk8-Hi EXT 'Ecru' reimagines the classic silhouette with a shortened collar, double tongues, and a padded ankle cage for a comfortable fit. A drawcord lacing system secures the cream-hued textile upper, fortified with off-white suede overlays and accented with a white leather side stripe. Pull tabs at the tongue and heel provide easy on and off. The sneaker rests on a color-matched vulcanized rubber midsole, marked with a crimson Vans license plate at the heel.

name: Vans Sk8-Hi EXT Advisory Board Crystals Black White
story: The Advisory Board Crystals x Vans Sk8-Hi EXT ‘Black White’ reunites the partner brands on a mixed-material design, highlighted by asymmetrical color blocking in neutral white, off-white and black tones. Secured with toggle lacing, the upper features a combination of suede, leather, textile and mesh. The shortened collar reveals an exposed foam lining, along with a mesh interior sleeve for a snug fit. Webbing pull tabs are added to the heel and tongue, the latter marked with dual Vans and Abc. branding. Underfoot, a waffle-tread outsole in gum rubber provides grippy traction.

Vans Old Skool Anderson .Paak Soulito
story: Releasing as part of a collaborative capsule with the multi-hyphenate recording artist, the Anderson .Paak x Vans Old Skool ‘Soulito’ reimagines the classic silhouette with a playful build inspired by AP’s two sons, Soul Rasheed and Shine. Soft lavender corduroy is utilized on the upper, featuring extra-wide wales on the toe and heel. White leather jazz stripes cut across the sneaker’s side panels, while ‘Yes Lawd’ is printed in black lettering across the interior heel of the right and left shoe. A bright green waffle-tread outsole provides tacky traction underfoot.

name: Vans Old Skool Anderson .Paak Ziti
story: Launching as part of a capsule collection with the multi-faceted recording artist, the Anderson .Paak x Vans Old Skool ‘Ziti’ draws inspiration from AP’s two sons, Soul Rasheed and Shine. The low-top is constructed from shaggy suede in blue and purple paneling with white leather side stripes. A fluorescent green tongue and yellow heel overlay deliver contrasting bursts of color. ‘Yes Lawd’ is inscribed across the interior heel of the right and left shoe. Underfoot, Vans’ waffle tread outsole is rendered in a vibrant green finish.

name: Vans Old Skool DX Anderson.Paak
story: Dropping as part of a capsule collection with the prolific recording artist, the Anderson .Paak x Vans Old Skool DX ‘Venice’ updates the classic low-top with an eye-catching psychedelic design. The shoe channels the energy of Paak’s major label debut, featuring a textile upper covered in flowing diagonal lines and a subtle checkerboard print in candy-bright hues. Mismatched eyelets and a translucent blue vinyl side stripe offer additional pops of color. ‘Yes’ and ‘Lawd’ are inscribed on the interior heel of each shoe.

name: Vans Sid DX Anderson.Paak
Vans Andrew Allen x Skate Authentic High 'Checkerboard'
Andrew Allen x Vans Skate Authentic High 'Blackout'
Vans Skate Half Cab '92 Andrew Reynolds
Vans Sk8-Mid Antihero Jeff Grosso
Vans Sk8-Hi Anti Social Social Club Get Weird White
story: The Anti Social Social Club x Dover Street Market x Vans Sk8-Hi was designed by ASSC's founder Neek Lurk specially for the global retailer's Singapore store launch. Revealed in July 2017, this 'Reverse' edition's canvas upper is updated with text-detailed laces, suede panels and a leather sidestripe. Elevated by tonal foxing tape, the midsole carries a 'Get Weird' slogan and rear license plate. A Waffle outsole issues a throwback element.

name: Vans Authentic Anti Social Social Club Get Weird Black
story: The Anti Social Social Club x Dover Street Market x Vans Authentic LX inaugurates the opening of the multi-brand retailer's Singapore location. Revealed in July 2017, this 'Reverse' edition features a canvas upper with starkly contrasted top-stitching, a signature flag label and metal eyelets. The soft-hued midsole is updated with 'Get Weird' text to the sidewall and striped foxing tape. A rear license plate and Waffle outsole issue a classic note.

name: Vans Authentic Anti Social Social Club Get Weird White
story: The Anti Social Social Club x Dover Street Market x Vans Authentic LX celebrates the launch of the global retailer's Singapore location. Debuted in May 2017, this 'White' version restyles the custom canvas upper with text-branded laces and contrast grid stitching. Striped foxing tape and Neek Lurk's 'Get Weird' slogan update the vulcanized midsole. A retro-inspired license plate on the heel and a Waffle outsole nod to the original.

name: Vans Sk8-Hi Anti Social Social Club Get Weird Black
story: The Anti Social Social Club x Dover Street Market x Vans Sk8-Hi celebrates the retailer's Singapore store launch with a look designed by ASSC's founder Neek Lurk. Unveiled in May 2017, this 'Black' iteration updates the canvas upper with wordmarks on the laces, contrast stitching and a leather sidestripe. The classic midsole picks up tonal foxing tape and 'Get Weird' text. A license plate on the heel and a Waffle outsole authenticate the makeover.

name: Arisa Trew x Vans Sk8-Hi 'Goldie'
Vans Asher Slip-On Checkerboard
Asher V Toddler 'Vansosaur'
Asher V Toddler 'Vanster'
Vans Era Ashley Williams Tiger Jugs
Vans Style 93 Ashley Williams Tiger Print
story: Known for her bold design and unique aesthetic, London-based designer Ashley Williams worked alongside Vans for the Ashley Williams x Style 93 'Tiger Print' sneaker. Part of a four-shoe pack released in March 2019, this Mary Jane-style shoe features a canvas tiger printed upper, reinforced by a rubber toe cap and buckle closure. Vans’ characteristic sole is replaced with a durable lug outsole for additional traction.

Atiba Jefferson x Vans Curren 'Emerald Green'
Atiba Jefferson x Vans Half Cab 'Oatmeal Beige'

Vans Atwood DX Waxed
story: The Vans Atwood DX is a lifestyle version of the brand's iconic silhouettes with a laid back style. Implementing modern Ortholite technology, this 'Dress Blues' canvas edition enables air flow to wick away moisture and help inhibit odor. Leather logo tags elevate the look and a padded tongue and collar cushion key areas. Vulcanized midsole construction and a gum rubber Waffle outsole provide signature grip and stability.

Vans Authentic 44 DX Anaheim Factory OG Birch
story: The Vans Authentic 44 DX sneaker pays tribute to the brand's first factory in Anaheim, California. It borrows details from the original silhouette, including a reference to its original name as the #44 Deck Shoe. This June 2017 tribute features a trademark canvas upper dressed in an Original Birch colorway with an ‘Off The Wall’ bumper logo at the heel. An upgraded UltraCush sockliner atop a waffle rubber outsole provides cushioned comfort down below.
